# services.spire

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.spire`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.spire.agent.configFile` | `absolute path` | Path to the SPIRE agent configuration file. See [the documentation](https://spiffe.io/docs/latest/deploying/spire_agent/) for more information. |
| `services.spire.agent.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable SPIRE agent. |
| `services.spire.agent.expandEnv` | `boolean` | Expand environment $VARIABLES in the config file |
| `services.spire.agent.package` | `package` | The spire package to use. |
| `services.spire.agent.settings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | SPIRE Agent configuration file options. See [the documentation](https://spiffe.io/docs/latest/deploying/spire_agent/) for all available options. |
| `services.spire.agent.settings.agent.data_dir` | `string` | A directory the agent can use for its runtime data |
| `services.spire.agent.settings.agent.join_token` | `null or string` | An optional token which has been generated by the SPIRE server |
| `services.spire.agent.settings.agent.join_token_file` | `null or string` | Path to a file containing an optional join token which has been generated by the SPIRE server |
| `services.spire.agent.settings.agent.server_address` | `string` | DNS name or IP address of the SPIRE server |
| `services.spire.agent.settings.agent.server_port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port number of the SPIRE server |
| `services.spire.agent.settings.agent.socket_path` | `absolute path` | Location to bind the SPIRE Agent API socket (Unix only) |
| `services.spire.agent.settings.agent.trust_domain` | `string` | The trust domain that this agent belongs to (should be no more than 255 characters) |
| `services.spire.agent.settings.plugins` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Built-in plugin types can be found at [the plugin types documentation](https://spiffe.io/docs/latest/deploying/spire_agent/#plugin-types). See [plugin configuration](https://spiffe.io/docs/latest/deploying/spire_agent/#plugin-configuration) for options and how to configure external plugins. |
| `services.spire.agent.settings.plugins.NodeAttestor` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Gathers information used to attest the agent's identity to the server. Generally paired with a server plugin of the same type. |
| `services.spire.agent.settings.plugins.NodeAttestor.join_token` | `null or (open submodule of (JSON value))` | The `join_token` is responsible for attesting the agent's identity using a one-time-use pre-shared key. Must be used in conjunction with the server-side `join_token` plugin. |
| `services.spire.agent.settings.plugins.NodeAttestor.join_token.plugin_data` | `submodule` | As a special case for node attestors, the join token itself is configured by a CLI flag (`-joinToken`) or by configuring `join_token` in the agent's main config body. |
| `services.spire.agent.settings.plugins.NodeAttestor.tpm` | `null or (open submodule of (JSON value))` | TPM 2.0 node attestation plugin. When set, automatically enables security.tpm2 and grants the spire-agent user access to the TPM device. |
| `services.spire.agent.settings.plugins.NodeAttestor.tpm.plugin_cmd` | `string` | Path to the TPM attestor agent plugin binary. |
| `services.spire.server.configFile` | `absolute path` | Path to the SPIRE server configuration file. See [the documentation](https://spiffe.io/docs/latest/deploying/spire_server/) for more information. |
| `services.spire.server.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable SPIRE Server. |
| `services.spire.server.expandEnv` | `boolean` | Expand environment variables in services.spire.server.settings and services.spire.server.configFile |
| `services.spire.server.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open firewall |
| `services.spire.server.package` | `package` | The spire package to use. |
| `services.spire.server.settings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | SPIRE Server configuration file options. See [the documentation](https://spiffe.io/docs/latest/deploying/spire_server/) for all available options. |
| `services.spire.server.settings.plugins` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Built-in plugin types can be found at [the plugin types documentation](https://spiffe.io/docs/latest/deploying/spire_server/#plugin-types). See [plugin configuration](https://spiffe.io/docs/latest/deploying/spire_server/#plugin-configuration) for options and how to configure external plugins. |
| `services.spire.server.settings.plugins.NodeAttestor` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | NodeAttestor plugins implement validation logic for nodes attempting to assert their identity. They are generally paired with an agent plugin of the same type. See [the documentation](https://spiffe.io/docs/latest/deploying/spire_server/#nodeattestor) for the list of built-in NodeAttestor plugins. |
| `services.spire.server.settings.plugins.NodeAttestor.join_token` | `null or (open submodule of (JSON value))` | Join token based node attestation. |
| `services.spire.server.settings.plugins.NodeAttestor.join_token.plugin_data` | `JSON value` | Plugin data for the join_token NodeAttestor. |
| `services.spire.server.settings.plugins.NodeAttestor.tpm` | `null or (open submodule of (JSON value))` | TPM 2.0 node attestation plugin from [spire-tpm-plugin](https://github.com/spiffe/spire-tpm-plugin). |
| `services.spire.server.settings.plugins.NodeAttestor.tpm.plugin_cmd` | `string` | Path to the TPM attestor server plugin binary. |
| `services.spire.server.settings.plugins.NodeAttestor.tpm.plugin_data` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Plugin data for the TPM NodeAttestor. Either `ca_path`, `hash_path`, or both must be configured. |
| `services.spire.server.settings.plugins.NodeAttestor.tpm.plugin_data.ca_path` | `null or string` | The path to the CA directory. Contains the manufacturer CA cert that signed the TPM's EK certificate in PEM or DER format. |
| `services.spire.server.settings.plugins.NodeAttestor.tpm.plugin_data.hash_path` | `null or string` | The path to the Hash directory. Contains empty files named after the EK public key hash. |
| `services.spire.server.settings.server.bind_address` | `string` | The address on which the SPIRE server is listening |
| `services.spire.server.settings.server.bind_port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port on which the SPIRE server is listening |
| `services.spire.server.settings.server.data_dir` | `string` | The directory where SPIRE server stores its data |
| `services.spire.server.settings.server.socket_path` | `string` | Path to bind the SPIRE Server API Socket to |
| `services.spire.server.settings.server.trust_domain` | `string` | The trust domain that this server belongs to |
